title: Replace QR code image with newly uploaded Luminia Gadgets QR (image-9.png)

requirements.summary: Replace the existing QR code image at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png with the newly uploaded QR code image (image-9.png) showing the Luminia Gadgets Google Pay QR code linked to Bank of Baroda 1897 with UPI ID luminiagadgets@okicici
acceptanceCriteria: The file at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png is replaced with the content of image-9.png.
The QR code image displayed in PaymentSection.tsx (after the customer clicks 'Proceed to Pay') shows the new Luminia Gadgets QR code.
The UPI ID displayed in PaymentSection.tsx reads 'luminiagadgets@okicici'.
The QR code image remains properly centered on all screen sizes.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing QR code asset with the newly uploaded image-9.png content. This asset shows the Luminia Gadgets Google Pay QR code linked to Bank of Baroda 1897 with UPI ID luminiagadgets@okicici. The replacement maintains the same filename and dimensions (600x600) for consistency with the PaymentSection component's image reference.

Update the UPI ID text display to show 'luminiagadgets@okicici' instead of the previous value. Verify that the QR code image reference points to frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.dim_600x600.png and that the image remains properly centered with responsive styling across all screen sizes. Do not modify the two-step payment flow logic, WhatsApp redirect functionality, or UTE reference number generation.
